item.title: Six Bills, One Direction: What Governor Ferguson’s 2026 Agenda Reveals About Power in Washington State - Conservative Ladies of Washington
item.description: News article "Six Bills, One Direction: What Governor Ferguson’s 2026 Agenda Reveals About Power in Washington State - Conservative Ladies of Washington" from Conservative Ladies of Washington.

item.title: The House Hot Sheet for Week 1 of the 2026 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "The House Hot Sheet for Week 1 of the 2026 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.

item.title: 👍Caitlin Safford - Washington State Office of the Governor
item.description: Caitlin Safford signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Office of the Governor.

item.title: 👍Dennis Worsham - Washington State Secretary of Health
item.description: Dennis Worsham signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Secretary of Health.

item.title: 👍Patty Kuderer - Washington State Insurance Commissioner
item.description: Patty Kuderer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Insurance Commissioner.

item.title: 👍Cora Breuner - Seattle Childrens
item.description: Cora Breuner signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Seattle Childrens.

item.title: 👍Michael Van Dyke - WCAAP
item.description: Michael Van Dyke signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WCAAP.

item.title: 👍Megan Moore - Washington State Public Heatlh Association
item.description: Megan Moore signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Public Heatlh Association.

item.title: 👍💵Marissa Ingalls - Association of Washington Healthcare Plans
item.description: Marissa Ingalls signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Healthcare Plans. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Dr. Frank Bell - WA Chapter American Academy of Pediatrics
item.description: Dr. Frank Bell signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Chapter American Academy of Pediatrics.

item.description: Dr. Helen Chu signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent UW Medicine.

item.description: Dr. Sandra Valenciano signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Public Health Seattle-King County.

item.description: Dr. Jay Miller signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Tacoma-Pierce County Health Department.

item.title: 👍💵Jaime Bodden - WSALPHO
item.description: Jaime Bodden signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WSALPHO. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Roy Simms - Community Health of Central Washington
item.description: Roy Simms signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Community Health of Central Washington.

item.title: 👍Dr. Katina Rue - Washington Academy of Family Physicians
item.description: Dr. Katina Rue signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Academy of Family Physicians.

item.title: Speaker signed.
item.description: Speaker signed.
